items.title_en: Can we have the day off?
items.title_zh: 我们能放假吗？
items.summary_en: A reflection arguing for institutional acceptance of taking full days off as a normal productivity and wellbeing tool rather than a luxury or punishment. It emphasizes that deliberate rest, clear boundaries and team norms around time off improve long-term output and morale.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张把整天休息视为常规的生产力与幸福工具，而非特权或惩罚。强调有意识的休息、明确的界限和团队对请假的共识，能提升长期产出与士气。

items.title_en: YouTube to automatically label AI-generated videos
items.title_zh: YouTube 将自动标注 AI 生成视频
items.summary_en: YouTube is rolling out automated labeling for AI-generated videos to help viewers identify synthetic content. The system aims to increase transparency and reduce misinformation, with tags appearing in search, recommendations, and thumbnails. The move will affect creators who leverage AI and could gradually normalize disclosure signals across the platform.
items.summary_zh: YouTube 正在推出自动标注 AI 生成视频的功能，以帮助观众辨识合成内容。该机制旨在提升透明度并降低误导风险，标签可能出现在搜索与推荐等位面。此举将影响使用 AI 的创作者，并推动在平台上逐步规范披露信号。

items.title_en: Hallucinate – Massively Multiplayer Online Rave
items.title_zh: 幻觉：大型多人在线电子派对
items.summary_en: A browser-based virtual rave that mixes real-time audiovisuals, avatars and persistent shared spaces to let many participants party together. It treats a rave as an MMO—prioritizing emergent social interactions, live visuals and music synchronization rather than a tightly structured event.
items.summary_zh: 一个基于浏览器的虚拟派对平台，将实时视听、头像和持久共享空间组合成多人在线体验。它把电子派对当作 MMO 来做，强调自发的社交互动、现场视觉与音乐同步，而不是单一的结构化活动。

items.title_en: I think Anthropic and OpenAI have found product-market fit
items.title_zh: 我认为 Anthropic 与 OpenAI 已找到产品-市场契合点
items.summary_en: The author argues that Anthropic and OpenAI have achieved product-market fit, suggesting their APIs and tooling are resonating with developers and enterprises. The view reflects a maturing AI ecosystem where practical, scalable offerings begin to outpace novelty. It highlights what successful AI tooling needs to scale.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为 Anthropic 与 OpenAI 已找到产品-市场契合点，表明它们的 API 与工具已经得到开发者和企业的共鸣。这一观点反映出 AI 生态系统逐步成熟，实用、可扩展的产品开始超越新奇性。也点出成功的 AI 工具要能实现规模化的关键要素。

items.title_en: DuckDuckGo search saw 28% more visits after Google said people love AI mode
items.title_zh: DuckDuckGo 搜索在 Google 宣称人们喜爱 AI 模式后访量上涨 28%
items.summary_en: DuckDuckGo saw roughly 28% more visits in the week after Google publicly touted AI mode, signaling interest in AI-enabled search options beyond the big players. The shift hints at how privacy-focused users respond to mainstream AI features and where alternative search engines fit in.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google 公布 AI 模式受欢迎的一周内，DuckDuckGo 的访问量增加了约 28%，显示 AI 功能对隐私导向用户的吸引力。此现象揭示隐私取向的用户在主流 AI 功能出现时如何寻找替代方案，以及替代搜索引擎的定位。

items.title_en: FBI Arrests CIA Official with $40M in Gold Bars in His Home
items.title_zh: FBI逮捕中情局官员，家中搜出价值 4,000 万美元的金条
items.summary_en: A national-security employee was arrested after authorities found about $40 million in gold bars at his residence, triggering criminal charges and scrutiny over potential financial misconduct. The case raises questions about how intelligence personnel are monitored for unexplained wealth and the intersection of internal security and federal law enforcement.
items.summary_zh: 一名情报人员因住所被查获约价值 4,000 万美元的金条而遭逮捕，并面临刑事指控，事件引发对其财务行为的审查。该案凸显了对情报人员无合理解释财富的监管缺口，以及内部安全与联邦执法之间的交集。

items.title_en: A Eureka machine that thinks like nature and explores what AI cannot
items.title_zh: 像自然一样思考的尤里卡机器：探索AI无法胜任的领域
items.summary_en: A nature-inspired 'Eureka' machine tackles problems that standard AI struggles with, hinting at new computational paradigms. By borrowing strategies from nature—adaptation, robustness, and self-organization—it reveals limits of current AI and points toward future research directions.
items.summary_zh: 一台受自然启发的“尤里卡”机器，尝试解决传统AI难以胜任的问题，揭示了新的计算范式潜力。通过借鉴自然界的适应性、鲁棒性与自我组织等策略，展示了现有AI的局限并指向未来的研究方向。

items.title_en: Last.fm is now independent
items.title_zh: Last.fm 现在独立运营
items.summary_en: Last.fm has achieved independence from its former owner, enabling autonomous product decisions and potentially different privacy posture. The move matters for long-time users and the sustainability of the platform in a competitive music landscape. It signals a wish to recalibrate how the service fits into modern open ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Last.fm 已实现独立运营，能自行决策产品路线并可能调整隐私策略。在竞争激烈的音乐生态中，这一举措关系到长期用户的体验与平台的可持续性。也显示出在现代开源生态中重新定位服务定位的愿望。

items.title_en: Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis
items.title_zh: 科技CEO 似乎在 AI 热潮中陷入‘AI 精神错乱’
items.summary_en: Tech CEOs are reportedly suffering from AI psychosis, a tongue-in-cheek description of how leaders react to AI hype. The piece argues that rapid shifts in AI narratives are reshaping strategy, hiring, and governance, sometimes more than actual product outcomes. This dynamic matters for investors and engineers plotting long-term roadmaps.
items.summary_zh: 科技界 CEO 被称在 AI 热潮中经历“AI 精神错乱”，用以描述领导者对 AI 热度的快速反应。文章认为 AI 叙事的迅速变化正在重塑战略、招聘与治理，有时影响力甚至超过实际产品成果。这一动态对投资者和工程师制定长期路线图至关重要。

items.title_en: Canada to order military plane fleet from Sweden in shift from US suppliers
items.title_zh: 加拿大将从瑞典订购军机机队，转向非美供应商
items.summary_en: Canada plans to order a Swedish-built military aircraft fleet, diversifying away from traditional US suppliers. The move signals a strategic shift in defense procurement and alliance dynamics, with implications for industrial partnerships, maintenance, and interoperability. The contract may reshape North American defense supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 加拿大计划从瑞典采购军事飞行器机队，寻求摆脱对美国供应商的依赖。这一举措体现了防务采购的战略调整及同盟关系的变化，对产业伙伴关系、维护与互操作性带来影响，可能重塑北美防务供应链。

items.title_en: Google employee charged with $1M Polymarket insider trading bet on search term
items.title_zh: 谷歌员工因在 Polymarket 上用内线信息下注 100 万美元被起诉
items.summary_en: An employee faces charges for allegedly using privileged access to place a roughly $1M bet on a prediction market tied to a search-term outcome, invoking insider trading laws in a novel context. The case highlights how traditional securities rules and surveillance can apply to decentralized or nontraditional markets when insider knowledge is used for profit.
items.summary_zh: 一名员工被控利用特权访问在一个预测市场上下注约 100 万美元，下注标的是与搜索词相关的结果，这一指控把传统内线交易法规带入了新型市场。此案强调当使用内部信息牟利时，传统的监管与监控手段也会适用于去中心化或非传统的交易平台。

items.title_en: SimCity 3k in 4k (2025)
items.title_zh: SimCity 3000 4K 重制（2025）
items.summary_en: A fan-made project recreates SimCity 3000 in 4K, updating visuals while preserving the classic city-building gameplay. The effort highlights how modern upscaling, art direction, and emulation can breathe new life into beloved 2000s games. For retro enthusiasts and streamers, it signals a growing niche of high-res nostalgia experiences.
items.summary_zh: 一个玩家自制项目将 SimCity 3000 重制为 4K，保留经典玩法的同时提升画质。此举展示了现代放大、美术风格更新与仿真技术如何为经典游戏注入新活力。对于怀旧玩家和主播而言，预示着高分辨率的复古体验日益兴起。

items.title_en: What Apple and Google are doing to push notifications
items.title_zh: 苹果与谷歌正在如何改造你的推送通知
items.summary_en: Apple and Google are tightening push notification controls with new privacy safeguards and user-centric options. The changes include clearer opt-ins, quieter notification channels, and smarter delivery to reduce spam while preserving essential alerts. Developers will need to adapt to new policies and API limitations.
items.summary_zh: 苹果与谷歌在推送通知方面加强了隐私保护和用户导向的控制，推出更清晰的授权、分级通知和更智能的投递策略以减少骚扰。开发者将需要调整应用以适应新的政策和 API 限制，影响通知体验与广告生态。

items.title_en: Private equity bought America's essential services
items.title_zh: 私募股权买下美国的基础公共服务
items.summary_en: The piece argues that private equity has increasingly acquired essential public-facing services, raising concerns about debt loads, cost-cutting, and long-term resilience. It highlights potential risks to affordability and access while outlining the incentives at play in capital-heavy sectors.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出私募股权日益收购关键公共服务，带来债务压力、成本削减和长期韧性方面的担忧，可能影响可负担性与可及性，同时揭示资本密集型行业中的激励机制。

items.title_en: The Problem with the Ferrari Luce EV Offers a Lesson for Every Leader
items.title_zh: 法拉利 Luce 电动车的问题：给每位领导者的教训
items.summary_en: Ferrari's Luce EV case illustrates how bold product ambitions can outpace execution and internal alignment. It offers leadership takeaways on aligning product strategy, stakeholder expectations, and brand messaging with operational reality.
items.summary_zh: 法拉利 Luce 电动车的案例揭示了大胆的产品野心若与执行力、内部对齐及品牌诉求不一致，容易落空。给出在产品战略、利害关系人期望与运营现实之间保持一致的领导力要点。

items.title_en: I analysed 20 years of my chats
items.title_zh: 我分析了二十年的聊天记录
items.summary_en: A long-running look at 20 years of chats reveals patterns in closeness, miscommunication, and evolving friendship dynamics. The analysis raises questions about self-awareness and the privacy costs of preserving intimate digital records.
items.summary_zh: 通过二十年的聊天记录，作者揭示了亲密度、沟通误差与友谊关系随时间的演变模式。此分析也引发对自我认知偏差以及保留大量私人对话所带来隐私代价的思考。

items.title_en: I'm Getting into Mesh Networks (Meshtastic, MeshCore, and Reticulum)
items.title_zh: 我开始接触网状网络（Meshtastic、MeshCore 与 Reticulum）
items.summary_en: The author shares first impressions exploring mesh networking platforms such as Meshtastic, MeshCore, and Reticulum, outlining potential use cases for resilient, off-grid communication.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享初步体验，探讨 Meshtastic、MeshCore 与 Reticulum 等网状网络平台的潜在应用，如离网环境下的鲁棒通信，同时指出不同技术栈的部署难点与取舍。

items.title_en: Rust (and Slint) on a Jailbroken Kindle
items.title_zh: 在越狱 Kindle 上运行 Rust 与 Slint
items.summary_en: A maker demonstrates running Rust and the Slint UI toolkit on a jailbroken Kindle, showing that modern language ecosystems can reach constrained devices. The experiment highlights how compact runtimes and cross-compilation enable interactive interfaces on e-readers.
items.summary_zh: 一位爱好者在越狱的 Kindle 上演示了 Rust 及 Slint 用户界面工具包的运行，证明紧凑的运行时和跨编译能够把现代语言生态带到受限设备。此类尝试凸显了在低功耗电子书阅读器上实现交互式界面的可行性。

items.title_en: All of human cooking compressed into 2 megabytes
items.title_zh: 把人类烹饪知识压缩到 2MB
items.summary_en: A study presents a compact representation of cooking knowledge compressed into about 2 megabytes, enabling recipe generation with minimal data. The result probes the limits of knowledge compression and what it implies for domain-specific modeling.
items.summary_zh: 一项研究提出把烹饪知识压缩至约 2MB 的紧凑表征，仍能生成多样化的食谱。结果探讨了知识压缩的极限及其对领域特定模型的含义。

items.title_en: Hetzner Price Adjustment
items.title_zh: Hetzner 调整服务器价格
items.summary_en: Hetzner announces price adjustments across its server lineup, reflecting broader cost pressures. The update outlines which products are affected and what customers should expect for ongoing hosting expenses.
items.summary_zh: Hetzner 公布了对其服务器产品的价格调整，反映出更广泛的成本压力。更新列出受影响的产品并说明客户在未来托管成本方面的预期。

items.title_en: Incident with Pull Requests, Issues, Git Operations and API Requests
items.title_zh: 关于拉取请求、问题、Git 操作及 API 请求的故障事件
items.summary_en: An incident disrupted pull requests, issues, Git operations, and API requests, affecting collaboration and automation workflows. The incident underscores the importance of platform reliability and clear incident communication.
items.summary_zh: 一次故障中断了拉取请求、问题追踪、Git 操作和 API 请求，影响协作与自动化工作流。事件凸显平台可靠性与清晰事件沟通的重要性。

items.title_en: Mini Micro Fantasy Computer
items.title_zh: 迷你微型幻想计算机
items.summary_en: Mini Micro Fantasy Computer showcases a tiny, approachable computer design that still supports expressive programming and exploration of architecture concepts. It serves as a playful, educational platform for hobbyists.
items.summary_zh: 迷你微型幻想计算机展示了一个极小巧却富于表达的计算机设计，便于学习架构概念并进行程序探索，面向爱好者的教育性平台。

items.title_en: Go: Support for Generic Methods
items.title_zh: Go：支持泛型方法
items.summary_en: Go adds support for generics and generic methods, enabling more reusable code and type-safe abstractions. This marks a major evolution for the language, improving ergonomics for library authors and API designers. Expect broader adoption in real-world projects as patterns become clearer.
items.summary_zh: Go 新增对泛型及泛型方法的支持，提升代码重用性与类型安全的抽象能力。这是语言发展中的一次重要演进，将提升库作者与 API 设计者的工作效率，随着使用模式逐步明朗，预计在实际项目中的应用将更广泛。

items.title_en: Gemini, Gophers, and Fingers. Oh My Alternative Internets Beyond HTTPS
items.title_zh: Gemini、Gophers 与 Fingers：超越 HTTPS 的替代互联网
items.summary_en: Examines Gemini, Gophers, and Fingers as alternative internet protocols, arguing they offer lightweight, privacy-respecting access to information beyond HTTPS, while noting practical limits and adoption barriers.
items.summary_zh: 评析 Gemini、Gophers 与 Fingers 等替代互联网协议，认为它们在超越 HTTPS 的同时提供轻量化、更注重隐私的内容访问，但也存在实际采用的局限性。

items.title_en: Warm up your MacBook (2019)
items.title_zh: 给 MacBook 预热
items.summary_en: A practical guide on keeping MacBooks responsive by warming up the machine before heavy workloads, including tips like allowing fans to ramp and preconditioning temperature to reduce thermal throttling.
items.summary_zh: 本文提供在执行高负载任务前对 MacBook 进行预热的实用做法，包括让风扇启动、对温度进行预调以减少热降频，从而保持系统的响应性。

items.title_en: Stress disrupts hippocampal integration of overlapping events, memory inference
items.title_zh: 压力与记忆：海马体在重叠事件中的整合受干扰
items.summary_en: New study shows that stress disrupts the hippocampus integrates overlapping events, impairing memory inference. The findings illuminate neural pathways behind stress-related memory changes and could inform treatments for anxiety-related cognitive effects.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现，压力会扰乱海马体对重叠事件的整合，削弱推断性记忆。结果揭示了压力对记忆的神经机制，或有助于理解焦虑相关的认知影响与治疗方向。

items.title_en: Seven Ways to Avoid Losing Your Job to AI
items.title_zh: 七种避免被 AI 取代工作的策略
items.summary_en: A practical guide to staying relevant in an AI-enabled workplace, emphasizing uniquely human skills, collaboration with AI, continuous learning, and responsible leadership.
items.summary_zh: 在AI驱动的职场中保持竞争力的实用策略，强调发挥人类独特技能、与AI协作、持续学习以及负责任的领导力。

items.title_en: On Labubu and the Hyperreal
items.title_zh: 谈 Labubu 与超现实
items.summary_en: Explores Labubu in relation to the hyperreal, examining how digital abstractions shape perception and meaning today.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 Labubu 与超现实之间的关系，审视数字抽象如何塑造当代的感知与意义。

items.title_en: Biff is a command line datetime Swiss army knife
items.title_zh: Biff：命令行日期时间瑞士军刀
items.summary_en: Biff bundles date-time parsing, formatting, arithmetic, and other utilities into a single CLI tool. It streamlines scripting and data workflows that repeatedly manipulate timestamps, time zones, and durations.
items.summary_zh: Biff 将日期时间解析、格式化、计算等工具整合到一个命令行工具中，便利需要频繁处理时间戳、时区与时长的脚本与数据工作流。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open-source Workspace (mail,docs,spreadsheet,drive) web/iOS
items.title_zh: Show HN：开源的工作区（邮箱、文档、表格、云盘）Web/iOS
items.summary_en: An open-source, self-hosted workspace bundle provides mail, docs, spreadsheets, and drive access on Web and iOS, offering a privacy-respecting alternative to SaaS. The project demonstrates maturity in open productivity stacks and the appeal of local control. It invites consideration of deployment, maintenance, and ecosystem compatibility.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：一个开源、可自托管的工作区，涵盖邮箱、文档、表格和云盘，提供 Web 和 iOS 端访问，作为对传统 SaaS 的隐私友好替代方案。该项目展示了开源生产力栈的成熟度以及对本地控制的吸引力。它引发了对部署、维护和生态兼容性的思考。

items.title_en: The Melancholy of Slaying Monsters
items.title_zh: 屠怪之忧郁
items.summary_en: Explores the emotional texture of monster-slaying narratives and why victory can feel melancholic rather than purely triumphant. It argues that the act of defeating monsters often leaves players with a sense of responsibility, fatigue, or moral ambiguity, shaping how designers tell stories and design systems.
items.summary_zh: 探索怪物屠杀叙事背后的情感纹理，阐释为何胜利有时会带来哀愁而非纯粹的胜利感。作者认为击败怪物的过程常伴随责任感、疲惫感或道德模糊，这也影响设计者如何讲述故事与构建系统。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open-Source AI Racing Harness
items.title_zh: 展示：开源 AI 赛车对接框架
items.summary_en: An open-source harness for running AI agents in racing simulations, providing standard interfaces, telemetry logging and tooling to evaluate control policies consistently. It aims to lower the friction for benchmarking autonomous-driving agents and enable reproducible competitions and research comparisons.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源对接框架，用于在赛车仿真中运行 AI 代理，提供统一接口、遥测记录和评估工具以实现一致的控制策略测试。它旨在降低基准测试自动驾驶代理的门槛，支持可复现的竞赛与研究比较。

items.title_en: Multi-Agent LLM System for Automated Vulnerability Discovery and Reproduction
items.title_zh: 用于自动化漏洞发现与复现的多代理大模型系统
items.summary_en: An arXiv paper presents a multi-agent LLM system that automates vulnerability discovery and reproduction, documenting how cooperative AI agents can accelerate security research. The work highlights both the potential and the need for careful safety controls when automating offensive security tasks.
items.summary_zh: 一篇论文提出了一个多代理大模型系统，用于自动化发现与复现漏洞，展示了协作式 AI 代理如何加速安全研究。该研究同时提醒了在自动化对抗性安全任务中对安全与伦理控管的必要性。

items.title_en: StumbleTV: Chat Roulette but for Exposed Webcams
items.title_zh: StumbleTV：面向暴露摄像头的聊天轮盘
items.summary_en: StumbleTV subverts traditional chat roulette by routing participants through exposed webcams, triggering debates about privacy, consent, and platform moderation in live video contexts.
items.summary_zh: StumbleTV 以暴露摄像头的随机视频聊天为主题，挑起关于隐私、同意和实时视频内容监管的讨论。

items.title_en: Raft Consensus with a Minority of Nodes
items.title_zh: 少数节点下的 Raft 共识
items.summary_en: Explores how Raft behaves when only a minority of nodes are available, highlighting tradeoffs between progress and safety in partitions and resilience. The discussion has practical implications for designing fault-tolerant distributed systems.
items.summary_zh: 分析在只有少数节点可用时 Raft 的表现，指出在分区与弹性场景下进展与安全性之间的权衡，对设计容错分布式系统具有实践意义。

items.title_en: Interleaved Deltas
items.title_zh: 交错增量编码
items.summary_en: Explores a data encoding technique called interleaved deltas, which interleaves small delta differences to improve compression and data locality in memory-mapped contexts. The approach can boost efficiency for time-series or indexed data.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍一种名为“交错增量”的数据编码技巧，通过把增量差分交错排列来提升压缩效率和内存局部性，尤其适合处理时间序列或索引数据时的带宽和缓存效率。

items.title_en: What Is a Direct Attach Copper (DAC) Cable? (2021)
items.title_zh: 直接附加铜缆（DAC）是什么
items.summary_en: DAC cables are short-range, high-speed copper interconnects used for server connections, offering cost and power advantages over fiber for inside-rack links. They bring simplicity and low latency but trade off maximum distance. This staple of data-center design remains relevant as workloads shift toward dense, power-efficient topologies.
items.summary_zh: 直接附加铜缆（DAC）是一种用于服务器的短距离高速铜缆，相较光纤在机架内链路具有成本与功耗优势。它的优点是简单、低延迟，但距离受限。DAC 仍然是数据中心设计中的重要选择，尤其在追求高密度与低功耗的拓扑中。

items.title_en: A New Typst Template for Pandoc (2025)
items.title_zh: 用于 Pandoc 的新 Typst 模板（2025）
items.summary_en: A modern Typst template for Pandoc workflows that brings high-quality typesetting, native typography and easier citation handling to document conversions. It streamlines producing print-ready PDFs from Markdown and other sources while leveraging Typst's layout features to replace traditional LaTeX templates.
items.summary_zh: 一个面向 Pandoc 的现代 Typst 模板，为文档转换带来更好的版面排版、原生排字和更方便的引用处理。它简化了从 Markdown 等源生成印刷级 PDF 的流程，利用 Typst 的布局能力替代传统 LaTeX 模板。

items.title_en: Investigating how prompt politeness affects LLM accuracy (2025)
items.title_zh: 研究提示礼貌如何影响大模型准确性（2025）
items.summary_en: An empirical study tests whether polite phrasing of prompts changes LLM outputs and accuracy across tasks, finding mostly small and task-dependent effects. The paper suggests politeness can alter model calibration or response framing but doesn't consistently boost objective correctness, so prompt tone matters more for user experience than raw accuracy in many cases.
items.summary_zh: 一项实证研究检验了礼貌用语是否会改变大模型在不同任务上的输出与准确性，发现影响普遍较小且依赖任务。研究表明礼貌可能影响模型的置信度或回应风格，但并不稳定地提高客观正确率，因此提示语气在用户体验上更有影响，而非始终提升准确性。

items.title_en: The Ask
items.title_zh: 请求的艺术
items.summary_en: Advice on how to make clear, responsible requests in work and life—framing asks with context, desired outcomes and constraints so others can respond effectively. The key takeaway is that good requests reduce friction, clarify ownership, and increase the chance of getting what you need without creating hidden obligations.
items.summary_zh: 关于如何在工作与生活中提出清晰、有责任感的请求：用背景、期望结果和限制来框定，让对方能有效回应。要点是：好的请求能减少摩擦、明确责任并提高达成目标的可能，同时避免产生隐含义务。

items.title_en: My new obsession: A horse-racing board game of pure luck
items.title_zh: 我的新痴迷：一款纯靠运气的赛马棋盘游戏
items.summary_en: A new obsession is a horse-racing board game driven entirely by luck, emphasizing social play and tactile components over strategy. It reflects a trend toward lighter, social games that reward quick interaction and shared moments. The game spotlights how accessibility and social dynamics can drive popularity.
items.summary_zh: 我的新痴迷是一款完全靠运气的赛马棋盘游戏，强调社交互动和触感体验，而非复杂策略。这体现了偏向轻量、社交型桌游的趋势，强调快速互动与共享时刻的魅力。

items.title_en: Zero Lines Maze: What the 8-Bit Guy's One-Liner Can Still Teach Us
items.title_zh: 零行迷宫：从 8-Bit Guy 的一行代码学到的东西
items.summary_en: A deep dive into an 8-bit-era one-liner that generates a maze, extracting lessons about clever encoding, minimal state machines and the power of constraints in programming. The write-up shows how tight resource budgets force elegant algorithms and why those techniques still matter for teaching and demo coding today.
items.summary_zh: 解析一段 8 位机时代的“一行代码”迷宫生成器，从中提炼出编码巧思、极简状态机和约束下的创造力。文章表明资源受限如何催生优雅算法，这些技巧在教学和演示式编程中依然有价值。

items.title_en: Matrix Multiplications on GPUs Run Faster When Given “Predictable” Data (2024)
items.title_zh: GPU 的矩阵乘法在数据可预测时跑得更快（2024）
items.summary_en: New findings show GPUs speed up matrix multiplication when input data patterns are predictable, reducing memory latency. This has practical implications for ML workloads, benchmarking, and compiler optimizations. It suggests data layout and pre-processing can meaningfully influence performance.
items.summary_zh: 研究表明，当输入数据模式可预测时，GPU 的矩阵乘法速度更快，降低了内存延迟。这对机器学习负载、基准测试和编译器优化有实际影响，暗示数据布局和预处理可以显著影响性能。

items.title_en: Human Bottlenecks
items.title_zh: 人类瓶颈
items.summary_en: Human Bottlenecks argues that human limitations shape system design, proposing interfaces and processes that reduce cognitive load, delay fatigue, and improve reliability in technology workflows.
items.summary_zh: 《人类瓶颈》主张人类局限性决定系统设计，应提出降低认知负荷、延缓疲劳、提升技术工作流程可靠性的界面与流程。

items.title_en: The Green Side of the Lua
items.title_zh: Lua 的绿色一面：能效与环境影响
items.summary_en: The paper examines energy efficiency and environmental impact of Lua and its lightweight runtime. It discusses methods for measuring energy use in scripting environments and what it means for energy-aware software.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨了 Lua 及其轻量化运行时的能耗与环境影响，介绍在脚本环境中衡量能耗的方法以及对能源感知软件的含义。

items.title_en: AI Datacenters Were Built for GPUs. What Happens When You Remove the GPUs?
items.title_zh: AI 数据中心：移除 GPU 后会如何
items.summary_en: GPU-centric AI data centers are being challenged as researchers explore CPU-first and alternative accelerators. Removing GPUs prompts questions about performance, cost, and software stack implications for AI workloads in cloud environments.
items.summary_zh: 以GPU为核心的AI数据中心正面临挑战，研究者开始探索先用CPU或其他加速器的方案。移除GPU会引发关于在云环境中AI工作负载的性能、成本与软件栈影响的讨论。

items.title_en: Freediving, Embodiment and Humanity
items.title_zh: 自由潜水、具身性与人性：Joanna Rutkowska
items.summary_en: Profiling Joanna Rutkowska's insights on freediving, embodiment, and humanity, tying extreme discipline to cybersecurity philosophy and human-centric tech design.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦 Joanna Rutkowska 对自由潜水、具身性与人性的洞察，将极端训练与网络安全哲学、以人为本的科技设计联系起来。

items.title_en: Rapira (Рапира) – Soviet programming language interpreter
items.title_zh: Rapira（Рапира）——苏联时期的编程语言解释器
items.summary_en: Rapira, a Soviet-era interpreter for a programming language, offers a window into early computing culture and language implementation. The project highlights how past constraints shaped design ideas that influenced later practices.
items.summary_zh: Rapira 是苏联时期的一个编程语言解释器，提供了了解早期计算文化与语言实现的窗口。该项目揭示了历史条件如何塑造设计思路，并影响后来的编程实践。

items.title_en: Seeing Around Corners Using Smartphone-Grade Lidar
items.title_zh: 通过手机级激光雷达看见拐角处
items.summary_en: Smartphone-grade LiDAR experiments show you can infer geometry beyond line-of-sight by analyzing reflections and timing. The technique has implications for robotics, AR, and privacy, enabling new sensing capabilities while raising safety concerns.
items.summary_zh: 通过手机级激光雷达的实验，展示通过分析反射和时间信息可以在视线外推断几何形状。这一技术对机器人、增强现实等领域意义重大，同时也带来隐私与安全方面的担忧。
